Operation 'ListFlowRevision' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is repetitive and lacks essential details. AI agents need to understand: (1) what a revision is in this context, (2) pagination support, (3) what data is returned. Added clarity about revision concept, pagination parameters, and response structure for better agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Retrieve a list of all Flows revisions.
data.current_description: Retrieve a list of all Flows revisions.
data.summary_suggestion: List all revisions for a Flow
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all revisions for a specified Flow. Each revision represents a version of the Flow definition. Supports pagination through limit and offset parameters. Returns an array of flow revision objects containing revision number, status (draft/published), and metadata for each revision.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks essential details. AI agents need to understand: (1) what a revision is in this context, (2) pagination support, (3) what data is returned. Added clarity about revision concept, pagination parameters, and response structure for better agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'FetchFlowRevision' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks context about what constitutes a revision and what data is returned. Added information about required parameters (Flow SID and revision number), return value structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific revision of a Flow identified by the Flow SID and revision number. Returns the complete flow revision object including the revision number, status (draft/published), definition, and metadata. Useful for accessing historical versions or comparing different revisions of a Flow.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what constitutes a revision and what data is returned. Added information about required parameters (Flow SID and revision number), return value structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'UpdateFlowValidate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original description is extremely vague and doesn't clarify that this is a non-destructive validation operation. AI agents need to understand: (1) what format the input should be, (2) that no state changes occur, (3) what the response contains. Added clarity about input format, non-destructive nature, error reporting, and use case.

data.description_suggestion: Validates a Flow JSON definition without persisting it. Accepts a complete or partial Flow definition in JSON format and checks for syntax errors, schema compliance, and logical consistency. Returns validation status and detailed error messages if validation fails. Does not create or modify any Flow - purely a validation operation. Useful for testing Flow definitions before publishing.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague and doesn't clarify that this is a non-destructive validation operation. AI agents need to understand: (1) what format the input should be, (2) that no state changes occur, (3) what the response contains. Added clarity about input format, non-destructive nature, error reporting, and use case.

message: Operation 'FetchTestUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks context about what test users are and why they're used. AI agents need to understand: (1) the purpose of test users, (2) what data is returned, (3) the required Flow SID parameter. Added domain context about test user purpose and clarified the response structure.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve test users for a Flow
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of test users configured for a specific Flow. Test users are used for testing Flow execution without affecting production. Returns an array of test user objects containing identifiers and contact information. Requires the Flow SID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what test users are and why they're used. AI agents need to understand: (1) the purpose of test users, (2) what data is returned, (3) the required Flow SID parameter. Added domain context about test user purpose and clarified the response structure.

message: Operation 'UpdateTestUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original description is vague about the action performed and lacks input/output details. AI agents need to understand: (1) whether this adds or replaces test users, (2) what input format is expected, (3) what is returned, (4) the side effect of replacing existing configuration. Added clarity about the operation's effect, input/output structure, and the Flow SID requirement.

data.summary_suggestion: Add or update test users for a Flow
data.description_suggestion: Adds or updates test users for a specific Flow. Accepts a request body containing test user identifiers and contact information. Replaces the existing test user configuration for the Flow. Returns the updated test user list. Test users are used for testing Flow execution in a non-production environment. Requires the Flow SID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about the action performed and lacks input/output details. AI agents need to understand: (1) whether this adds or replaces test users, (2) what input format is expected, (3) what is returned, (4) the side effect of replacing existing configuration. Added clarity about the operation's effect, input/output structure, and the Flow SID requirement.

message: Operation 'FetchExecutionStep' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is too generic and lacks domain context. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves an Execution Step (not just any step), specifies the required parameters, and indicates what information is returned. This helps AI agents understand the hierarchical relationship (Flow > Execution > Step) and when to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve an Execution Step within a Flow
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific Execution Step from an active or ended Flow Execution. Returns the step details including the step name, type, and execution status. Requires the Flow SID, Execution SID, and Step SID.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks domain context. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves an Execution Step (not just any step), specifies the required parameters, and indicates what information is returned. This helps AI agents understand the hierarchical relationship (Flow > Execution > Step) and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'FetchExecutionStepContext' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about what 'context' means in this domain. Improved version explains that context includes variables, results, and state information, helping AI agents understand the distinction between the step itself and its execution context.

data.current_summary: Retrieve the context for an Execution Step.
data.current_description: Retrieve the context for an Execution Step.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the execution context data for a specific Execution Step, including variables, results, and state information captured during step execution. Returns the step context object with all data relevant to that step's execution. Requires the Flow SID, Execution SID, and Step SID.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about what 'context' means in this domain. Improved version explains that context includes variables, results, and state information, helping AI agents understand the distinction between the step itself and its execution context.

message: Operation 'CreateFlow' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and provides no guidance on inputs or outputs. Improved version specifies required inputs (name, definition), explains the initial draft status, and clarifies the return value. This helps AI agents understand the flow creation workflow and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new Studio Flow definition
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Studio Flow with the provided definition. Requires a friendly name and flow definition JSON. The newly created Flow is initially in draft status and can be published later. Returns the created Flow object with its SID, status, and metadata.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and provides no guidance on inputs or outputs. Improved version specifies required inputs (name, definition), explains the initial draft status, and clarifies the return value. This helps AI agents understand the flow creation workflow and what to expect.

message: Operation 'ListFlow' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear, but description lacks details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and response structure. Improved version explains pagination support and clarifies what fields are returned, enabling AI agents to properly handle large result sets.

data.current_summary: Retrieve a list of all Flows.
data.current_description: Retrieve a list of all Flows.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all Studio Flows in the account. Supports filtering and pagination parameters. Returns an array of Flow objects with their SIDs, names, statuses (draft or published), and metadata. Results can be limited and offset for pagination.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and response structure. Improved version explains pagination support and clarifies what fields are returned, enabling AI agents to properly handle large result sets.

message: Operation 'UpdateFlow' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description provides no context about what can be updated or the implications. Improved version clarifies that both definition and status can be updated, explains the significance of publishing, and helps AI agents understand the state transitions involved.

data.summary_suggestion: Update a Flow's definition or status
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing Studio Flow's definition, status, or metadata. Can modify the flow definition JSON or change the status between draft and published. Requires the Flow SID. Returns the updated Flow object. Publishing a Flow makes it available for execution.
